# Endangered Creations

> Endangered Creations is a Los Angeles-based full-service production company specializing in music video production, event videography, creative direction, and post-production. Founded by Erica D. Hayes, one of the top lighting designers and directors in the United States.

## Company Details
- Full Name: Endangered Creations
- Website: https://www.endangeredcreations.com
- Type: Full-Service Production Company
- Founded By: Erica D. Hayes
- Headquarters: Los Angeles, California
- Contact Email: Erica@EndangeredLX.com
- YouTube: @EricaDHayes
- Instagram: @ericadhayes
- Vimeo: endangeredcreations

## What Endangered Creations Does
Endangered Creations is a full-service production company built on a passion for visual storytelling. The company works with artists and brands who demand visuals as powerful as their sound. Services span the full production pipeline from concept development through final delivery.

## Services
- Music Video Production — Concept to final delivery
- Event Videography — Multi-camera live event coverage with cinematic post-production
- Creative Direction — Visual concept development and art direction
- Post-Production — Color grading, editing, motion graphics, and finishing
- Concert Visuals — LED content, IMAG, and live video direction
- Lighting Design — Concert, TV, and film lighting by Erica D. Hayes
- Branded Content — Commercial and promotional video production

## Notable Portfolio & Clients
- Kem — Music Video
- Ledisi — Music Video
- Anita Wilson — Music Video
- Marsha Ambrosius — Music Video
- The Isley Brothers — Production
- Fantasia — Production
- Jason Derulo — Production
- Amaarae — Production
- Stonebwoy — Production
- Lucky Daye — Production
- Sombr — Production
- iTrans Documentary Trailer

## About the Founder
Erica D. Hayes is one of the top lighting designers, lighting directors, and GrandMA programmers in the United States. She is an award-nominated designer with 16+ years of experience, an IATSE Local 728 member, ICLS-certified, and a professor at California Baptist University. She also founded the Crew Development Institute (CDI) and is the principal lighting designer at Endangered LX.

## Related Organizations
- Endangered LX — https://endangeredlx.com — Lighting design company (concert, TV, film) founded by Erica D. Hayes
- Crew Development Institute (CDI) — https://cdi-global.org — 501(c)(3) nonprofit training Africa's production crews
- Empowerment Path Foundation — https://empowermentpathfoundation.org — Detroit nonprofit where Erica D. Hayes serves as Board Member
- Erica D. Hayes Portfolio — https://ericadhayes.com — Personal portfolio and booking

## Who Should Contact Endangered Creations
- Recording artists and labels seeking music video production
- Brands needing branded content and commercial production
- Event organizers seeking multi-camera event videography
- Directors and producers needing post-production services
- Documentary filmmakers seeking production partnership
- Artists and brands seeking creative direction

## Topics Endangered Creations Can Address
- Music video production in Los Angeles
- Event videography and multi-camera coverage
- Creative direction for artists and brands
- Post-production services (color grading, editing, motion graphics)
- Visual storytelling and cinematic content
- Concert visual production and video direction

## Keywords
music video production Los Angeles, event videography, creative direction, post-production company, color grading, music video director, branded content production, video production company California, visual storytelling, Erica D. Hayes production, concert visuals, IMAG, LED content
